title: Ritsuko and Seele in Episode 23
wikitext:
[]: Ritsuko & Seele in Episode 23             Quote Post by Hazukari » Thu Jan 01, 2009 9:29 pm Just out of currosity but why was it when Ritsuko was presented beofre the SEELE Council in ep 23, is there a praticular reason she was naked? My theory has always been it was to make her loose more of her dignity, but thats just me^^ also this is a really really really dumb question, but ill ask it anyway, but in ep 24 when Shinji is fighting Unit 02 is there a reason as to how he is flying, i always thought it was Kaworu's AT Field or even Rei's but i think im wrong here

[]:             Quote Post by V » Thu Jan 01, 2009 9:32 pm there are a couple of other threads discussing this I appologize for not having links off hand but there were some good points raised in those

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Thu Jan 01, 2009 9:41 pm http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3759 ^ this Be advised tho, it's a longish thread, and some of the comments stray a bit off-topic.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jan 01, 2009 10:09 pm Long story short: Ritsuko was naked in episode 23 because Seele's goons raped her. However, you should read that thread, it explains the how and the why.

[]: Re: question about ritsuko in episode 23             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 01, 2009 10:58 pm Hazukari wrote: also this is a really really really dumb question, but ill ask it anyway, but in ep 24 when Shinji is fighting Unit 02 is there a reason as to how he is flying

[]:             Quote Post by Count A'ight » Fri Jan 02, 2009 1:14 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Long story short: Ritsuko was naked in episode 23 because Seele's goons raped her.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Fri Jan 02, 2009 1:22 am But it's most likely.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Jan 02, 2009 1:33 am Shin-seiki wrote: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3759 ^ this Be advised tho, it's a longish thread, and some of the comments stray a bit off-topic.

[]:             Quote Post by Count A'ight » Fri Jan 02, 2009 1:35 am Legendary wrote: But it's most likely.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Jan 02, 2009 2:07 am Beats the other explanation, "we stripped you for teh lulz," especially on the count of why she takes it so hard.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Jan 02, 2009 9:13 am Count A'ight wrote: Legendary wrote: But it's most likely.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 02, 2009 9:31 am Count A'ight wrote: That's highly contestable.

[]: Re: question about ritsuko in episode 23             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jan 07, 2009 1:25 am Hazukari wrote: also this is a really really really dumb question, but ill ask it anyway, but in ep 24 when Shinji is fighting Unit 02 is there a reason as to how he is flying, i always thought it was Kaworu's AT Field or even Rei's but i think im wrong here

[]: Ritsuko's Placement Upon Seele             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Thu Jul 09, 2009 7:59 pm [Identical thread merged in] Near the end of the series Ritsuko is sent to the Seele committee to speak with them, nude, in place of Rei. After hearing from Seele that Ikari is the one who sent her there, she is crushed, and this helps to provoke her decision in destroying the Dummy system. Simple question: Why? Really don't understand why she was sent there or why she would be offended by being sent there. Can someone clear that up for me please? TANK YAH

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jul 09, 2009 8:03 pm She probably felt betrayed.

[]: Re: Ritsuko's Placement Upon Seele             Quote Post by scarmullet » Thu Jul 09, 2009 8:08 pm DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Near the end of the series Ritsuko is sent to the Seele committee to speak with them, nude, in place of Rei. After hearing from Seele that Ikari is the one who sent her there, she is crushed, and this helps to provoke her decision in destroying the Dummy system. Simple question: Why? Really don't understand why she was sent there or why she would be offended by being sent there. Can someone clear that up for me please? TANK YAH

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Thu Jul 09, 2009 8:20 pm Felt betrayed how.... That is never explained. Why didn't she feel honored that he sent her there instead of Rei? Feel more important? There's more to it than just randomly feeling betrayed about something that doesn't even involve betrayal. And yeah.... I don't think they forgot that he used the lance because of that....

[]:             Quote Post by Zaque » Thu Jul 09, 2009 8:30 pm Read this.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Thu Jul 09, 2009 8:30 pm Get your answers here (warning, really long thread and it takes a while to get to the answer). [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3759&postdays=0&postorder=asc&start=0[/url]
